title: Artemis 2 launches on first human mission to the moon in more than 50 years
summary:
The first human mission beyond Earth orbit in more than 50 years is underway with an April 1 launch of four astronauts on a flight around the moon.

title: SpaceX quietly files for big bang IPO
summary:

summary:

title: Aspect Aerospace secures early funding to advance swarm-deployable VLEO satellites
summary:
Aspect Aerospace, a University of South Alabama spin-off, has raised $2.4 million to develop circuit-board-sized spacecraft that could be deployed from space into very low Earth orbit in swarms to monitor the space environment.
